channel.title: GitHub ReScript Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of ReScript in GitHub

item.title: juspay/hyperswitch-control-center
item.description: Open sourced control center for managing Hyperswitch - an open sourced payment switch.

item.title: juspay/hyperswitch-web
item.description: Hyperswitch Web SDK: A Rescript powered React library for seamless payment integration and customization.
